title: rubus hirtus subsp. insolatus
intro: Rubus hirtus subsp. insolatus, also known as a type of thorny raspberry, is a plant species that belongs to the Rubus genus. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to inhibit platelet aggregation and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Rubus hirtus subsp. insolatus include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce oxidative stress. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, and is also used in herbal infusions and salves to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
